rootCause: The electronics tin-soldering-iron quest was stored at frontend/src/pages/quests/json/electronics/soldering-intro.json while its id remained electronics/tin-soldering-iron, creating path/id drift and broken path-based references.
resolution: Renamed the quest file to frontend/src/pages/quests/json/electronics/tin-soldering-iron.json, updated docs and asset metadata references, and added a regression test that fails whenever a quest id differs from its category/file path.
